convention_audit.verdict: Gaussian convention matches required R_xy(theta,phi) with I->+x and Q->+y.
notes: Pulse._sample_analytic builds complex envelope with exp(+i*(carrier*t + phase)).
hamiltonian_time_slices couples coeff to bdag and conj(coeff) to b on qubit channel.
With |g>=+z and |e>=-z, numerical two-level tests determine the effective IQ sign unambiguously.
